source: EHC_Checker_RULE_SET_v4_5_1.docx Part H2 — Known Consignees, Consignors and Logistics Agents

entries.name: Novades BV
entries.notes: Novades BV also commonly appears as I.6 Operator — confirmed normal practice, do not flag. I.13 loading point: Port of Purfleet, Great Britain — confirmed normal on Van Bentum / Zeebrugge ro-ro trade lane.

entries.name: Navobi
entries.address: JHR.DR.C.J. Sandbergweg 7, 3852 PT, Staverden (Gem. Ermelo), Netherlands

entries.name: Uniblock
entries.address: Coes Road Industrial Estate, Dundalk, A91 TD60, Ireland

entries.name: Feed & Food Trading BV
entries.notes: Sweet whey powder, animal feed, Calais route.

entries.name: Milkeen Krzysztof Cyba
entries.notes: Sweet whey powder, 8468 human consumption. County Milk / Saputo Davidstow loads, Calais FRCQF1, Poland lane. Updated v4.1: address format and product description.

entries.name: Puratos Nederland N.V.
entries.address: Hartog Logistics / Puratos, Bloemendaalse Zeedijk 10, 4765 BP Zevenbergschenhoek, Netherlands

entries.name: Milkpol Polska Sp. z o.o.
entries.notes: Sweet whey powder, 8468 human consumption, Calais route. I.5 and I.6 same entity.

entries.name: ENTC Dairy Solutions Sp.z.o.o
entries.notes: Sweet whey powder, 8468 human consumption, Calais route. Receives County Milk Products / Saputo Davidstow loads. MOVED from H4 Cat 3 in v2.1.

entries.name: Arla Foods Ingredients P/S / Arla Foods Ingredients Group P/S
entries.address: I.1 consignor: c/o Taw Valley Creamery, South Weeke, North Tawton, Devon EX20 2DA. I.5 consignee (all AFI EHCs): Soenderhoej 1-12, DK-8260 Viby-J, Denmark.
entries.notes: Always correct regardless of I.9 destination or I.12 end customer.

entries.name: Caldic Ingredients Denmark A/S
entries.notes: 8468 human consumption. AFI Variolac whey permeate sample lane, air freight via Stockholm Airport (SE ARN 4 – SJV). First seen 19/09/2025.

entries.name: Farmel Dairy Products BV
entries.notes: I.5 and I.6 same entity = normal. County Milk / Saputo Davidstow sweet whey powder, Calais FRCQF1 lane. Added v4.1.

entries.name: CLASADO LIMITED
entries.address: Imperium Building, Imperial Way, Worton Grange, Reading, Berkshire, RG2 0TD
entries.notes: Brand owner / 'manufactured for' arrangement — no approval number. I.6 operator = same entity as I.1 on Clasado/Saputo Davidstow GOS lane (GOS syrup to Germany via Calais FRCQF1). Added v4.2.

entries.name: MEGGLE GMBH & CO. KG
entries.address: Megglestrasse 6–12, D-83512, Wasserburg am Inn, Germany
entries.notes: Clasado/Saputo Davidstow GOS syrup, Calais FRCQF1. Also H3 I.12 destination (approval N/A on 8468-general). Added v4.2.

entries.name: NUMIDIA B.V.
entries.address: Boven de Wolfskuil 6, 6049 LZ Herten, Netherlands
entries.notes: County Milk / Saputo Davidstow sweet whey powder, Calais FRCQF1. I.5 and I.6 same entity = normal — do not flag. 8468 human consumption. Added v4.3.

entries.name: HAVERO HOOGWEGT
entries.notes: County Milk / Saputo Davidstow sweet whey powder, Calais FRCQF1. I.6 operator is Seabrook Global Logistics Ltd (separate entity — do not flag). 8468 human consumption. Added v4.3.

entries.name: Fayrefield Foods A/S
entries.notes: Saputo Davidstow (GB CQ 501) SWP → Esbjerg DKEBJ1, Immingham–Esbjerg DFDS lane. I.5 and I.6 same entity = normal. 8468 human consumption. First seen 26/2/177136 → C&R 26/2/183052. Added v4.5.

entries.name: Makeway Ltd
entries.address: Riverstown Business Park, X91 TRF9, Co. Waterford, Republic of Ireland
entries.notes: AFI Taw Valley NI/Irish lane (Variolac 857 → North Down Grain, Warrenpoint). Named consignee in I.5 — correct per E15. Added v4.5.

entries.name: Interfood BV
entries.notes: I.5 and I.6 same entity = normal. Saputo Davidstow SWP → Jonker & Schut Barneveld (I.12 207165). Route varies (Zeebrugge BE-BEZEE1 / Purfleet seen on 26/2/176421). 8468 human consumption. Added v4.5.
